(define (problem blocksworld-invert-stacks)
  (:domain blocksworld)
  (:requirements :strips)
  (:objects b1 b2 b3 b4 b5 b6 b7 b8 b9 b10 b11 b12 b13 b14 b15 b16)
  (:init
    ;; Tower 1 (height 1): b1
    (on-table b1)
    (clear b1)
    
    ;; Tower 2 (height 2): b2 on table, b3 on b2
    (on-table b2)
    (on b3 b2)
    (clear b3)
    
    ;; Tower 3 (height 5): b4 on table, b5 on b4, b6 on b5, b7 on b6, b8 on b7
    (on-table b4)
    (on b5 b4)
    (on b6 b5)
    (on b7 b6)
    (on b8 b7)
    (clear b8)
    
    ;; Tower 4 (height 8): b9 on table, b10 on b9, b11 on b10, b12 on b11, b13 on b12, b14 on b13, b15 on b14, b16 on b15
    (on-table b9)
    (on b10 b9)
    (on b11 b10)
    (on b12 b11)
    (on b13 b12)
    (on b14 b13)
    (on b15 b14)
    (on b16 b15)
    (clear b16)
    
    ;; Arm is empty
    (arm-empty)
  )
  (:goal
    (and
      ;; Tower 1 inverted: b1 on top (was on bottom, now clear on table)
      (on-table b1)
      (clear b1)
      
      ;; Tower 2 inverted: b2 on top of b3
      (on-table b3)
      (on b2 b3)
      (clear b2)
      
      ;; Tower 3 inverted: b4 on top
      (on-table b8)
      (on b7 b8)
      (on b6 b7)
      (on b5 b6)
      (on b4 b5)
      (clear b4)

      (on-table b16)
      (on b15 b16)
      (on b14 b15)
      (on b13 b14)
      (on b12 b13)
      (on b11 b12)
      (on b10 b11)
      (on b9 b10)
      (clear b9)
      
      ;; Arm is empty
      (arm-empty)
    )
  )
)

(define (problem blocksworld-invert-stacks)
  (:domain blocksworld)
  (:requirements :strips)
  (:objects b1 b2 b3 b4 b5 b6 b7 b8 b9 b10 b11 b12 b13 b14 b15 b16 b17 b18 b19 b20)
  (:init
    ;; Tower 1: b1 (height 1)
    (on-table b1)
    (clear b1)
    
    ;; Tower 2: b2 (height 1)
    (on-table b2)
    (clear b2)
    
    ;; Tower 3: b3 (height 1)
    (on-table b3)
    (clear b3)
    
    ;; Tower 4: b4-b9 (height 6, b4 on table, b9 on top)
    (on-table b4)
    (on b5 b4)
    (on b6 b5)
    (on b7 b6)
    (on b8 b7)
    (on b9 b8)
    (clear b9)
    
    ;; Tower 5: b10-b20 (height 11, b10 on table, b20 on top)
    (on-table b10)
    (on b11 b10)
    (on b12 b11)
    (on b13 b12)
    (on b14 b13)
    (on b15 b14)
    (on b16 b15)
    (on b17 b16)
    (on b18 b17)
    (on b19 b18)
    (on b20 b19)
    (clear b20)
    
    ;; Arm state
    (arm-empty)
  )
  (:goal
    (and
      ;; Tower 1: b1 inverted (still single block on table, so same)
      (on-table b1)
      (clear b1)
      
      ;; Tower 2: b2 inverted (still single block on table, so same)
      (on-table b2)
      (clear b2)
      
      ;; Tower 3: b3 inverted (still single block on table, so same)
      (on-table b3)
      (clear b3)
      
      ;; Tower 4: b9-b4 inverted (b9 on table, b4 on top)
      (on-table b9)
      (on b8 b9)
      (on b7 b8)
      (on b6 b7)
      (on b5 b6)
      (on b4 b5)
      (clear b4)
      
      ;; Tower 5: b20-b10 inverted (b20 on table, b10 on top)
      (on-table b20)
      (on b19 b20)
      (on b18 b19)
      (on b17 b18)
      (on b16 b17)
      (on b15 b16)
      (on b14 b15)
      (on b13 b14)
      (on b12 b13)
      (on b11 b12)
      (on b10 b11)
      (clear b10)
      
      ;; Arm state
      (arm-empty)
    )
  )
)
